category_sources: Official rustic documentation describes rustic as a fast and secure backup program.
source_facts.description identifies rustic as fast, encrypted, deduplicated backup software.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use rustic as the project name.
docs_sources: Official Learn page links to user, config, and developer documentation.
Official dedicated user documentation is hosted at rustic.cli.rs/docs.
Official repository README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rustic-rs/rustic, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes rustic backup workflows.
